title: 続きを進めて。/kernelで。 /kernel verdict を実装に落とします。まず SSOT と gate/test の現状を読み、次に「substitution 禁止・shadow continuity の み許可」を文書化し、最後に静的テストで固定します。 • Updated Plan └ Implement the /kernel-verified fallback policy: forbid baseline substitution by Copilot/Gemini, allow only shadow continuity, and lock it in with do...
summary_text: - Remaining mismatch: [`scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh) direct-Claude gate (`REQUIRE_DIRECT_CLAUDE_ASSIST`) only checks `provider=claude` success and does not require a direct route (nor exclude `fallback_used=true`), so `claude-via-copilot-cli` can still satisfy the gate, which conflicts with the strict direct-provider wording in [`AGENTS.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md), [`README.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/README.md), and [`CODEX.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/CODEX.md). - Missing test coverage for that mismatch in [`tests/test-aggregate-tutti-votes.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-aggregate-tutti-votes.sh).
